# Attention Is All You Need

By Ashish Vaswani, Noam Shazeer, and colleagues.

## Abstract

We propose the Transformer, a model architecture relying entirely on an
attention mechanism to draw global dependencies between input and output.

## Results

The Transformer generalizes well to other tasks, achieving a new
state-of-the-art BLEU score of 41.8 on the WMT 2014 English-to-French
translation task.
